/opt/apps/gcc/13.2.0/bin/gfortran   -std=f2008  -O3 -funroll-all-loops "CMakeFiles/chimescalc-test_serial-F08.dir/serial_interface/examples/fortran08/main.F90.o" -o chimescalc-test_serial-F08  -Wl,-rpath,/work2/09982/aoladipupo/stampede3/codes/chimes_calculator-LLfork/build libchimescalc_fortran.so libchimescalc.so
